description:
List of names (male and female) with numbers; alms distribution list. At the top of verso it says "recipients of charity in Jerusalem."

Names on recto include: Yosef al-Ashqar; the old woman from Raḥba (al-ʿajūz al-Raḥbiyya); the faqīh(?) and the daughter of his brother; Mūsā the beadle (al-khādim) al-[...]; Khalaf al-Murahhiṭ; Laylā(?); Sulaymān; an orphan (al-[...] yatīm); Nāhiyya al-[...]; Umm Ḥusn; the sister of Ḥusayn; the sister of Mawhūb; Miryam al-[...]; Isḥāq Ibn al-Najjār; Umm ʿAmmār; ʿUjayba?); Ibn Mattān(?).

Names on verso include: Yosef al-[...]; the wife of the beadle; Yosef al-[...]; Khalaf Ibn al-Munajjim; Mukhtār b. [...]; [...] b. Ḥunayn.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
